description: Letter from Shemuel b. Ḥananya to "ha-Kohen he-Ḥaver," in Malīj. In Judaeo-Arabic with some Hebrew. Dating: ca. 1140–1159 CE, if Shemuel b. Ḥananya was serving as Nagid at the time when he sent this letter. The handwriting looks like that of Natan b. Shemuel; Shemuel b. Ḥananya appears to have signed in his own hand in the margin of recto. The letter is quite damaged and the contents are difficult to reconstruct. Mentions Rabbenu Elʿazar b. Natan; judges; the city of Malīj; people who are disgruntled about money (not being paid?); 15 dinars; the holy congregation (al-jamāʿa al-muqaddasa); Shelomo ha-Kohen ha-Zariz. May be instructing the addressee to appoint someone to a communal leadership position. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב משמואל בן חנניה ל'הכהן החבר' במליג; ביהודית-ערבית עם עברית; תיארוך: כ-1140-1159 לספירה; מזכיר רבנו אלעזר בן נתן ו-15 דינרים; ייתכן ממנה מישהו לתפקיד קהילתי
